title: ⚙Golem Toys⚙
description: Adds copper golem plushies/toys without replacing the copper golem statue block, replacing only the item version of it
body:
![Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e82de6e629918d4618c24e5b6da1760db4fe461.png)

**Golem TOYS adds toys/plushies to the game, by replacing the copper golem statue item with a brand new 3D model and 2D sprites to display in your hands or in item frames, without affecting the block version of the statues** 

Check gallery for more images!! Available in vanilla colors and vibrant colors!
![some sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f27ac0c66c149f5310bf017d07aec35d11848ddb.png)


 Check my other Packs:
 - [**Amoozing COWS**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amoozing-cows)
 - [**Cluckin' CHICKS**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cluckin-chicks)
 - [**Better BATS**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-bats)

 - [**ENCHANTRAX**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantrax)
 - [**Better Keys**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-keys)
